# Description
Default merge request template

# Checklist

## Development and testing

- [ ] The code is linted and formatted
- [ ] The code changed/move as a part of this MR has been tested
- [ ] All the tests related to the changes passed

## Pre-release and review

- [ ] CI build is green
- [ ] Code scanning tools don't have issues
- [ ] Changes were reviewed by at least one Senior Engineer
- [ ] ServiceNow ticket/change was linked to this MR
